response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for '常夜リペイント' (Tokoyami Repaint). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized lyrics and spoken sections to ensure accurate transcription of the electronic remix. 3. Timing & Pacing: Applied aggressive truncation and instantaneous transitions for the rapid-fire member calls and chorus sections to prevent cascading delays. Prioritized spoken lyrics over simultaneous fan signs as per instructions.

subtitles.original: 「そこに跪け！」
subtitles.english: "Kneel before us!"

subtitles.original: 「吐いて捨てるような現実を」
subtitles.english: "We are slashing through the disposable reality"

subtitles.original: 「一刀両断叩き斬る」
subtitles.english: "Slicing it in one strike!"

subtitles.original: 「終わりなき輪廻に迷いし子らよ」
subtitles.english: "Children lost in the endless samsara"

subtitles.original: 「漆黒의 翼で誘おう」
subtitles.english: "Let us lure you with our jet-black wings"

subtitles.original: 「我らエデンの星を統べる者、 秘密結社…」
subtitles.english: "We are the rulers of the stars of Eden, Secret Society..."

subtitles.original: 「holoX!!」
subtitles.english: "holoX!!"

subtitles.original: ウォッオー ウォッオッオッ オーオーオー
subtitles.english: Woah-oh Woah-oh-oh Oh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: How Low? どうしようもないこの世界
subtitles.english: How Low? This world is hopeless

subtitles.original: (どうして欲しい？)
subtitles.english: (What do you want?)

subtitles.original: Black Out 終末告げる鐘が鳴る
subtitles.english: Black Out The bell signaling the end is ringing

subtitles.original: ラッパッパッパラ パって踊ろうぜ Tripしようぜ
subtitles.english: Ra-pa-pa-pa-ra Let's dance together, Let's take a trip

subtitles.original: 陰キャも陽キャも Sing a Song
subtitles.english: Introverts and extroverts too, Sing a Song

subtitles.original: 気持ちいいことだけが すべて 堕ちて いく 闇の底へ
subtitles.english: Everything is just about feeling good, Falling down into the bottom of the darkness

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い メロディ ほら どうぞ どうぞ 手の鳴る方へ
subtitles.english: Sweet, sweet melody, here you go, here you go, towards where the hands are clapping

subtitles.original: もう逃げられない ほら 闇に染まれば 世界を塗り替えろ
subtitles.english: Already can't escape, look, once you're stained in darkness, Repaint the world

subtitles.original: 望めばくれてやろう すべて
subtitles.english: If you wish for it, we'll give it to you, everything

subtitles.original: 常識 破り捨てろ くるくる狂い倒せ 火を付けろ
subtitles.english: Break the common sense, spin around and go crazy, light the fire

subtitles.original: (ラッパッパーラッパッ)
subtitles.english: (Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)

subtitles.original: すべてを喰らいつくせ
subtitles.english: Devour everything

subtitles.original: (ラッパッパーラッパッ)
subtitles.english: (Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)

subtitles.original: 秘密を 教えてやろう
subtitles.english: We will teach you the secret

subtitles.original: ウォッオー ウォーッオーオー オーオーオー
subtitles.english: Woah-oh Woah-oh-oh Oh-oh-oh

subtitles.original: 悪のカリスマ 導くぞ民草
subtitles.english: Charisma of evil, leading the commoners

subtitles.original: 正義とか知らないし 地鳴らして誘い
subtitles.english: We don't know about justice, Luring them while shaking the ground

subtitles.original: マジメに不真面目 弊社の通過儀礼
subtitles.english: Earnestly not serious, the passing ritual of our company

subtitles.original: 望み求め 願い叶え 世界征服
subtitles.english: Seek your wishes, grant your desires, world conquest

subtitles.original: ラーパッパって歌おうぜ Swingしようぜ
subtitles.english: Let's sing Ra-pa-pa, let's Swing together

subtitles.original: 退屈な世界へ Bye Bye Bye
subtitles.english: Bye Bye Bye to the boring world

subtitles.original: 覚めることのない夢を 魅せる ほら お眠りなさい
subtitles.english: We will show you a dream that never ends, Here, go to sleep

subtitles.original: もっともっと 奥へ ほら どうぞ どうぞ イキたいんでしょ？
subtitles.english: More, more, deeper, Here, go ahead, go ahead, you want to go, right?

subtitles.original: もうやめられない ほら 悪に染まれば 世界を塗り替えろ
subtitles.english: Already can't stop, look, once you're stained in evil, Repaint the world

subtitles.original: 望むもの与えよう すべて
subtitles.english: We'll give you what you want, everything

subtitles.original: ルールを書き換えろ くるくる回し尽くせ 焼き尽くす
subtitles.english: Rewrite the rules, spin it all around, Burn it down

subtitles.original: (ラッパッパーラッパッ)
subtitles.english: (Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)

subtitles.original: すべてのマガイモノへ
subtitles.english: Towards all the imposters

subtitles.original: (ラッパッパーラッパッ)
subtitles.english: (Ra-pa-pa-ra-pa-pa)

subtitles.original: 秘密を 教えてやろう
subtitles.english: We will teach you the secret

subtitles.original: 「機は熟した！狂気の宴の始まりだ！ 貴様ら、準備はいいか！！」
subtitles.english: "The time is ripe! The banquet of madness begins! You guys, are you ready!!"
"Ohhh!!!"

subtitles.original: 「刮目せよ！！」
subtitles.english: "Behold!!"

subtitles.original: (クロヱ！！クロヱ！！)
subtitles.english: (Chloe!! Chloe!!)

subtitles.original: 「手あげろ！手あげろ！！」
subtitles.english: "Hands up! Hands up!!"

subtitles.original: (いろは！！いろは！！)
subtitles.english: (Iroha!! Iroha!!)

subtitles.original: 「叫ぶでござる～！」
subtitles.english: "Scream!!"

subtitles.original: (こより！！こより！！)
subtitles.english: (Koyori!! Koyori!!)

subtitles.original: 「踊っちゃえ！踊っちゃえ！！」
subtitles.english: "Dance! Dance!!"

subtitles.original: 「世界を手にするholoX！ 世界を変えていくholoX！」
subtitles.english: "holoX taking the world! holoX changing the world!"

subtitles.original: (ルイ姉！ルイ姉！！)

subtitles.original: 「最後は全員いくぞ！」
subtitles.english: "Last one, everyone let's go!"

subtitles.original: (holoX！holoX！！)
subtitles.english: (holoX! holoX!!)

subtitles.original: 「世界を手にするholoX！」
subtitles.english: "holoX taking the world!"

subtitles.original: 「世界を変えてくholoX！ 世界をこの手にholoX！」
subtitles.english: "holoX changing the world! holoX with the world in its hands!"
